ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizing_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the apparel category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the sizing chart */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit used (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the chart was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the chart */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES apparel_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apparel_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apparel category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the apparel category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the apparel category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the category */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES apparel_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_categories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sizing chart */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., L, 1X, 2X) */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US size equivalent */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* European size equivalent */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the size was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the size */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES sizing_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "sleeve_width" REAL /* Sleeve width measurement */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement */,
  "outseam" REAL /* Outseam measurement */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Thigh measurement */,
  "calf" REAL /* Calf measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit used (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the measurement */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sizing chart */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES sizing_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement unit (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the measurement unit (e.g., in, cm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement unit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the unit was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the unit */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_units_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_units_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to convert between units */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the conversion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the conversion was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the conversion */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the conversion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the brand was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the brand */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brands_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brands_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the region was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the region */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the permission */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)
